sentences.arabic: ذَهَبْتُ الْيَوْمَ إِلَى مُقَابَلَةِ عَمَلٍ جَدِيدَةٍ فِي شَرِكَةٍ كَبِيرَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Danas sam otišao na novi razgovor za posao u velikoj firmi.
sentences.translationEn: I went to a new job interview at a big company today.

sentences.arabic: سَأَلَنِي الْمُدِيرُ عَنْ خِبْرَاتِي السَّابِقَةِ وَمَهَارَاتِي الْمِهْنِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Direktor me je pitao o mojim prethodnim iskustvima i profesionalnim vještinama.
sentences.translationEn: The manager asked me about my previous experiences and professional skills.

sentences.arabic: كُنْتُ وَاثِقاً مِنْ نَفْسِي وَأَجَبْتُ عَنْ جَمِيعِ الْأَسْئِلَةِ بِهُدُوءٍ.
sentences.translation: Bio sam samouvjeren i smireno sam odgovorio na sva pitanja.
sentences.translationEn: I was confident and answered all the questions calmly.

sentences.arabic: آمُلُ أَنْ أَحْصُلَ عَلَى هَذِهِ الْوَظِيفَةِ قَرِيباً.
sentences.translation: Nadam se da ću uskoro dobiti ovaj posao.
sentences.translationEn: I hope to get this job soon.
